ValidationRule.description: If no priority is assigned, status cannot be changed to Primary, Backup, or Flagged.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( SF_Priority__c = 0, SF_Priority__c = NULL), OR( TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Primary', TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Backup', TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Flagged' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tracker Status cannot be 'Primary', 'Backup', or 'Flagged' when priority is missing.
